mdq:check.name: Resource Title Present
mdq:check.description: Check that a dataset title is present and not empty.
mdq:check.code:
def call(): global output global status global title
import metadig.variable as mvar
# Check if title exists if 'title' not in globals() or title is None: output = "A dataset title was not found." status = "FAILURE" return False
# Convert to string if needed title = mvar.toUnicode(title)
# Check if blank if mvar.isBlank(title): output = "The dataset title is blank." status = "FAILURE" return False
# Check minimum length title_str = title.strip() if isinstance(title, str) else str(title) if len(title_str) < 5: output = f"The dataset title is too short ({len(title_str)} characters). Minimum 5 characters recommended." status = "FAILURE" return False
# Success if len(title_str) > 50: display_title = title_str[:50] + "..." else: display_title = title_str
output = f"Dataset title found: '{display_title}' ({len(title_str)} characters)" status = "SUCCESS" return True

dialect.name: ISO 19115 and ISO 19115-2 / ISO 19139 and ISO 19139-2
